_provenance.captured_from: tests/fixtures/accounting/pendle_pt/expected_baseline.sqlite (VIB-5403 real-fork PT hold->buy->hold->sell symmetric round-trip on Arbitrum, PT-free wallet; same DB as the ratchet fixture)
_provenance.note: Real-Anvil baseline (same DB the check-accounting-ratchet gate scores), recaptured for VIB-5403/VIB-5406. Clean SYMMETRIC round-trip on a PT-free wallet (Anvil dev acct 0): the strategy HOLDS iteration 1 (hold_iterations_before_buy=1) so the first snapshot is PRE-buy (PT=0), then PT_BUY -> hold -> PT_SELL of the exact same quantity -> post-sell snapshot PT=0. PEN1-6 PASS; PEN6 quantity-conserved (bought==sold). G1 PASS + G6 PASS (the VIB-5403 advance): G1 reads the disposal money-trail (sy_amount x sy_price) now that VIB-5403 PERSISTS sy_price on PT_SELL/PT_REDEEM (it was computed-but-dropped before). G6 books the disposal leg's REALIZED-yield PnL (realized_yield_usd, a delta) into sum_swap per blueprint 27 §11.3 SELL-leg registry -- NOT the gross proceeds VIB-5319 mistakenly booked. On a symmetric bracket the realized model ties: wallet_pnl vs component_pnl gap = $0.00085 << eps=$0.103 (the ambient ETH reval cancels both sides; the held PT is 0 at both endpoints so no held-PT mark leaks in). NOTE: the earlier provenance blamed G1/G6 on the VIB-5276 gateway PT/SY implied-price path -- that was WRONG. The disposal sy_price is the base/underlying (wstETH) USD price from price_inputs_json, a standard oracle read; G6 PASS is VIB-5276-INDEPENDENT. The deterministic post-sell PT=0 snapshot depends on VIB-5406 (the snapshot/drain race fix, merged in #3012) -- before it the disposal could race the snapshot and leave a phantom held-PT lot. G11 SKIP = no failed intents. G14/G15/L5_22 XFAIL = Track-C / registry-mode not on for this run (same shape as every other primitive's frozen fixture).
